summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Streamlit House Socioeconomic Analyzer app. All core features working perfectly including file upload, image preview, AI analysis, and results display.
passed_tests: Streamlit app loads correctly on port 8501
File upload component accepts PNG/JPG/JPEG/WEBP images
Image preview displays after upload (multiple images shown)
Analyze button appears when images are uploaded
AI analysis returns detailed classification with reasoning
Results displayed properly in formatted result box
Sidebar information displays correctly (About This App, Tips)
Additional context input field works correctly
Success message appears after analysis completion
